---
title: "Ban D'Arguin seagrass"
author: "Lee, Chengfa Benjamin"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: bookdown::html_document2
bibliography: references.bib 
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: inline
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

library(magrittr)
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(sf)
library(leaflet)
library(viridis)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggiraph)
library(ggpubr)
```

This study explores the biomass data of the seagrass meadows at Ban D'Arguin. For more information on the field sampling, please refer to [this GitPage](https://sigoiry.github.io/Arguin---FieldWork-Data-Processing/). 

All analyses were performed in R version 4.5.2 [@Rversion].

# Data

```{r preprocessing}
#| echo: false
#| error: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

core_area <- pi*(0.15/2)^2

csv <- read_xlsx('data/Info spectral measure_biomass core_BdA_Biomass 2026.xlsx') %>% 
    select(-c(...14, ...15)) %>%
    rename(c(class = comment)) %>%
    mutate(cover = as.numeric(cover), lat = as.numeric(lat), lon = as.numeric(lon), location = factor(location, levels = sort(unique(location))),
           AG_DW = `AG biomass (g DW)`/core_area, BG_DW = `BG Biomass (g DW)`/core_area, AG_BG.ratio = AG_DW/BG_DW)
```

```{r samplingDesign}
#| echo: false
#| error: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

stations <- csv %>%
  filter(!is.na(lat)) %>%
  st_as_sf(coords = c('lon', 'lat'))

# group_bounds <- read_sf('data/shp/Polygons.shp')
#   group_bounds$colour <- c('darkred','darkgreen')

map_centre <- stations %>%
  st_union() %>%
  st_centroid() %>%
  st_coordinates()

viridis.location <- viridis(csv$location %>% unique() %>% length(), option = "turbo")
pal.shp <- colorFactor(viridis.location, 
                       domain = c("Arel","Baie d'Aouatif 11","Baie d'Aouatif 3","Ebelg Eiznaya","Niroumi edge","Zira" ))

m.shp <- leaflet(stations) %>%
  addProviderTiles(providers$CartoDB.PositronNoLabels) %>%
  setView(map_centre[1], map_centre[2], 6) %>%
  addCircleMarkers(radius = 2, color = ~pal.shp(location), fillOpacity = 1, label = ~station) %>%
  addLegend(pal = pal.shp, values = ~location, opacity = 1, title = "Location")

m.shp
```

```{r LeafDW}
#| echo: false
#| error: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| fig.width: 9
#| fig.cap: Above- and belowground seagrass biomass across the different Ban D'Arguin locations.

csv %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(AG_DW, BG_DW), names_to = 'component', values_to = 'DW') %>%
  filter(DW != 0) %>%
  ggplot(aes(y = DW, x = location, fill = location)) +
    geom_boxplot() +
    scale_fill_manual(values = viridis.location, drop = FALSE, guide = 'none') +
    xlab('Location') + ylab(bquote('Dry weight ('~g/m^2~')')) +
    facet_grid(. ~ component, labeller = labeller(component = c(AG_DW = 'Aboveground biomass', BG_DW = 'Belowground biomass')))
```

# Comparison

```{r compareLeafRoot}
#| echo: false
#| error: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| fig.cap: Ratio of aboveground biomass to belowground biomass across the different Ban D'Arguin locations.

csv %>%
  filter(AG_BG.ratio != 0) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = location, y = AG_BG.ratio, fill = location)) +
    geom_boxplot() +
    scale_fill_manual(values = viridis.location, drop = FALSE, guide = 'none') +
    xlab('') + ylab('Ratio of aboveground biomass to belowground biomass') 
```

```{r compileLeafRoot}
#| echo: false
#| error: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| fig.cap: Comparison of leaf biomass to root biomass in Ban D'Arguin.

plt.agb_bgb_compiled <- csv %>%
  filter(AG_DW != 0) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = AG_DW, y = BG_DW)) +
    geom_smooth(method = 'lm') +
    geom_point_interactive(aes(colour = location, tooltip = paste0("Station: ", station, ", Ratio: ", format(round(AG_BG.ratio, 2), nsmall = 2)), data_id = station)) +
    scale_colour_manual("Location", values = viridis.location, drop = FALSE) +  
    xlab(bquote('Leaf dry weight ('~g/m^2~')')) + ylab(bquote('Root dry weight ('~g/m^2~')')) +
    stat_regline_equation(label.x.npc = 'centre', label.y.npc = 'bottom', decreasing = TRUE, aes(label =  paste(..eq.label.., ..adj.rr.label.., sep = "~~~~")), colour = 'blue') 

girafe(ggobj = plt.agb_bgb_compiled,
         options = list(
           opts_hover(css = "stroke-width:1px"),
           opts_hover_inv(css = "opacity:0.25"),
           opts_tooltip(opacity = 0.95, css = "padding:4px; font-size:18px")
         ),
         height_svg = 5, width_svg = 12
  )
```


# References
